title: Filament Nexo Add-On
description: Filament add-on for Nexo / Oraxen support!
body:
# Oraxen and Nexo

[![Documentation](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/generic_64h.png)](https://tomalbrc.de/docs/filament)
[![Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/filament-entity)
[![CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_64h.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/filament-entity)
[![GitHub](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_64h.png)](https://github.com/tomalbrc/filament-nexo)  

[![discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/9X6w2kfy89)  


This filament add-on adds basic support Nexo packs through filament.

Nexo and Oraxen packs are supported!

Please keep in mind that the supports for those formats is still work in progress!
If you encounter any issues, report them to the github or on my discord server.

# Usage

Create a folder called "nexo" in your games root directory and copy your oraxen or nexo packs into it.
```
└── mods/
└── nexo/
    └── your-pack/
        ├── items/
        └── pack/
```

The folder name of the pack should not contain spaces or special character, it is used as namespace in the identifier for your items and blocks:
`your-pack:your_item`

The assets will automatically be added to the generated resource-pack.
